You are ____ Humayun Ahmed I see.

‘______ people know the truth about his past.’ –

Which determiner can be used to fill the gap?
Choose the correct sentence:
options_html: He was completely finished with his work.
He was finished with his work.
He was totally finished with his work.
He was finished up completely with his work.
correct_answer_html: He was finished with his work.

question_html: In the word ‘panacea’, the prefix, ‘pan’ refers to-
Walking through the forest, ______.
options_html: the path of the traveller was moonlit
the traveller saw the moon above the trees
the moon lit up the leaves of the tree
correct_answer_html: the traveller saw the moon above the trees

question_html: She is down with ____flu.
In the word ‘Pseudonym’, the prefix, ‘Pseudo’ refers to-
Upon hatching, ______.
options_html: swimming is known by the young ducks
young ducks know how to swim
how to swim is known in young ducks
the knowledge of swimming is in young duck
correct_answer_html: young ducks know how to swim

question_html: We came to a final _____.

‘There were ______ students present in the hall.’ –

Which is appropriate determiner here?
______, the passer-by took a nap.
Which of the following sentences is correct?
_____Youth is the best time of life.
The pond is ____ forty feet deep.
Choose the correct sentence-
options_html: Flying outside the window, he grabbed the papers
Flying out of the window, he grabbed the papers
Flying out the window, the papers were grabbed by him
Flying out the window, he grabbed the papers
correct_answer_html: Flying out the window, the papers were grabbed by him
